press.description: - press key — single key tap (enter, escape, space, tab, e, 1, 2, f5, etc). PREFERRED for buttons and shortcuts.
press.short_description: - press key — PREFERRED for buttons and shortcuts

hold_key.description: - hold_key / release_key key — modifier hold/release (shift, ctrl, alt). Always pair them.

type.description: - type text — type a string character by character.

click.description: - click / right_click / middle_click / double_click x y — use when no keyboard shortcut exists.
click.short_description: - click / right_click / middle_click / double_click x y

drag.description: - drag x1 y1 x2 y2 — click-hold, move, release. For draggable items, sliders, camera pan.
drag.short_description: - drag x1 y1 x2 y2 — use rulers to find EXACT CENTER of source element

scroll.description: - scroll x y amount — mouse wheel (positive=up, negative=down). For zoom, lists.

hover.description: - hover x y — move cursor without clicking. For tooltips, inspection.

wait.description: - wait seconds — pause (decimal ok, e.g. 0.5). ONLY when the game needs time for animations.
